caption: A man with glasses and a large, silver, pointed wig sits in a studio setting, wearing a white dress shirt, a red bow tie, and light-colored suspenders. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone positioned in front of him. Behind him is a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs. On-screen text and logos appear on both sides of the frame; on the left, a logo reads "THE STALLION PODCAST," and on the right, red text reads "GOSS TALK 101." Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, gesturing slightly with his mouth open as he speaks. The background and equipment remain static, while the man's facial expressions and head movements shift slightly as he continues his dialogue.
